summary: Backend testing for LUXE TV IPTV app. 16/16 pytest tests passed. All requested flows validated: health, auth (register/login/me), categories, channels listing with category filter and case-insensitive search, channel sensitive-key leakage check, stream endpoint with VIP gating (user blocked / admin allowed), favorites CRUD, admin source CRUD with URL masking + background M3U sync against real iptv-org TR list (channels populated), admin user listing without passwords, role update vip<->user, and admin-only endpoint 403 checks for normal users.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, just a deprecation warning).
JWT_SECRET has an in-code fallback default ('iptv-super-secret-change-me-2026'); should be required from env in production to avoid weak Fernet key derivation.
sync_source uses asyncio.create_task without storing the task reference; if the event loop is busy on shutdown the background sync could be cancelled. Acceptable for current scope.

mask_url returns first 12 + *** + last 6 — for short URLs (<20 chars) returns '***' which is safe, but the masked form for the iptv-org TR url still reveals 'https://iptv-o' + '***' + 'tr.m3u'; consider masking host as well if extra privacy desired.
seed_data_creation: Created one runtime test user 'testuser_<timestamp>' via /api/auth/register. Created one M3U source 'TEST_TR_PUBLIC' pointing to https://iptv-org.github.io/iptv/countries/tr.m3u and deleted it at the end of the test (along with its channels). Admin user is seeded by backend itself.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL = https://iptv-stream-71.preview.emergentagent.com. All /api routes are reachable via Kubernetes ingress. Pytest file is at /app/backend/tests/test_iptv_backend.py - reuse for regression. Admin login admin/admin123 works. Seed inserts 8 demo channels (2 VIP). The 'name' Pydantic field is bound to fixture parameter; do not rename. Background M3U sync of TR list takes ~5-15s; test polls up to 45s.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All 25 features in the review request validated successfully end-to-end including encryption guarantees (no stream_url/url/url_enc/source_id leakage in channels, no raw URL leakage in /api/admin/sources responses).
